item.title: Home
item.description: # D&D Notes Welcome to my D&D campaign notes. Use the sidebar or search to explore the world.

item.title: Alpha Owl-Bear
item.description: the ALPHAest owl-bear around… Lore Description physical description of the character Characterization explanation of who the character is in terms of their personality and some backstory Other any lore or additional information that isn’t description Goals list of what this persons overall goals are...

item.title: Alayna Clorvus
item.description: The impressionable young daughter of the Clorvus family.

item.title: Awakened Mother
item.description: An incredibly powerful (and subsequently dangerous) entity that requires dark rituals and blood sacrifice to create.

item.title: Basogre
item.description: A fearsome hulk of an ogre that lives in the Ramsted Sewers. His past is unknown, as is his connection to Immasi.

item.title: Bearjamin goodberry
item.description: a secretary within the Shaded Leaf Party Lore Description A juvenile black bear.

item.title: Bearnald Honeymaw
item.description: Viceroy of the Heart candidate for Shaded Leaf Party Lore Description physical description of the character Characterization explanation of who the character is in terms of their personality and some backstory Other Animals of the forest, you have today a chance between the sad Goals list of what th...

item.title: Bram Ironskin
item.description: A Dwarven Master Blacksmith. He is one of the few beings to be let into the Azer Holy Forge based on his skill and knowledge of shaping metals.
